calendar.matters:
Petitioner Citigroup Global Markets, Inc. Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: NATHAN JASKOWIAK, ESQ., 415.398.6000, FOR PETITIONER CITIGROUP GLOBAL MARKETS, INC.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Citigroup Global Markets, Inc.'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award IS Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. JUDGMENT signed in open court. Judge: Paul J. Alvarado, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: PETITIONER CITIGROUP GLOBAL MARKETS, INC. MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. Judge Miller is recused. Per order of the Presiding Judge, the matter will be heard on August 9, 2013 in Department 302 when another judge will be presiding in Department 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
